# kCMVideoCodecType_Cinepak | Apple Developer Documentation

-  kCMVideoCodecType_Cinepak 

Global Variable# kCMVideoCodecType_Cinepak

A type that identifies the cinepak format.iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
var kCMVideoCodecType_Cinepak: CMVideoCodecType { get }
```
